check_interval_sec.description: Time interval, in seconds, between each health check; must be between 1 and 300 seconds.

description.description: Provides a description for the regional health check, detailing its purpose or identifying characteristics.

grpc_health_check.description: Defines the gRPC health check configuration, including the service name and port for regional health checks.

healthy_threshold.description: The number of consecutive successful health checks required before marking a backend as healthy. Must be a positive integer.

http2_health_check.description: Defines the configuration for an HTTP/2 health check, including settings like request path, port, and response timeout, used to monitor the health of regional resources.
http2_health_check.type: list(object({host: optional(string),port: optional(number),port_name: optional(string),port_specification: optional(string),proxy_header: optional(string),request_path: optional(string),response: optional(string)}))

http_health_check.description: Defines the configuration for an HTTP health check, including parameters such as request path, port, and response timeout, to monitor the health of regional resources.
http_health_check.type: list(object({host: optional(string),port: optional(number),port_name: optional(string),port_specification: optional(string),proxy_header: optional(string),request_path: optional(string),response: optional(string)}))

https_health_check.description: Defines the HTTPS health check configuration for monitoring the health of resources in a specific region.
https_health_check.type: list(object({host: optional(string),port: optional(number),port_name: optional(string),port_specification: optional(string),proxy_header: optional(string),request_path: optional(string),response: optional(string)}))

log_config.description: Specifies the logging configuration for the health check, enabling or disabling logging of health check requests.

name.description: Name of the regional health check, must be unique within the project and region, and comply with Google Cloud naming conventions.

ssl_health_check.description: Defines the configuration for an SSL health check, including parameters such as port, request path, and response timeout, to monitor the health of resources in a specific region.
ssl_health_check.type: list(object({port: optional(number),port_name: optional(string),port_specification: optional(string),proxy_header: optional(string),request: optional(string),response: optional(string)}))

tcp_health_check.description: Defines the TCP health check configuration, including port and optional request/response settings, to monitor the health of regional resources.
tcp_health_check.type: list(object({port: optional(number),port_name: optional(string),port_specification: optional(string),proxy_header: optional(string),request: optional(string),response: optional(string)}))

timeout_sec.description: The amount of time, in seconds, to wait for a response before marking the health check as failed. Must be greater than zero.

timeouts.description: Defines the timeout settings for the region health check, specifying the maximum duration allowed for each request to complete.

unhealthy_threshold.description: Specifies the number of consecutive health check failures required to mark a VM as unhealthy; must be an integer between 1 and 10.
